title: Home Network - Host Metrics
description: CPU, memory, disk, network and load for all otel_nodes. Data from otelcol-contrib hostmetrics receiver via ClickHouse.

list.name: host
list.label: Host
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT ResourceAttributes['host.name'] FROM otel.otel_metrics WHERE ResourceAttributes['host.name'] != '' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS time, ResourceAttributes['host.name'] AS host, (1 - avg(Value)) * 100 AS cpu_pct FROM otel.otel_metrics WHERE MetricName = 'system.cpu.utilization' AND Attributes['state'] = 'idle' AND ResourceAttributes['host.name'] ILIKE '$host' AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 3 HOUR GROUP BY time, host ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS time, ResourceAttributes['host.name'] AS host, avg(Value) * 100 AS mem_pct FROM otel.otel_metrics WHERE MetricName = 'system.memory.utilization' AND Attributes['state'] = 'used' AND ResourceAttributes['host.name'] ILIKE '$host' AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 3 HOUR GROUP BY time, host ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS time, ResourceAttributes['host.name'] AS host, avg(Value) AS load1 FROM otel.otel_metrics WHERE MetricName = 'system.cpu.load_average.1m' AND ResourceAttributes['host.name'] ILIKE '$host' AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 3 HOUR GROUP BY time, host ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS time, concat(ResourceAttributes['host.name'], ' rx') AS series, avg(Value) AS bytes FROM otel.otel_metrics WHERE MetricName = 'system.network.io' AND Attributes['direction'] = 'receive' AND Attributes['device'] NOT IN ('lo') AND ResourceAttributes['host.name'] ILIKE '$host' AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 3 HOUR GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS time, concat(ResourceAttributes['host.name'], ' tx') AS series, avg(Value) AS bytes FROM otel.otel_metrics WHERE MetricName = 'system.network.io' AND Attributes['direction'] = 'transmit' AND Attributes['device'] NOT IN ('lo') AND ResourceAttributes['host.name'] ILIKE '$host' AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 3 HOUR GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT concat(ResourceAttributes['host.name'], ':', Attributes['mountpoint']) AS volume, avg(Value) * 100 AS used_pct FROM otel.otel_metrics WHERE MetricName = 'system.filesystem.utilization' AND ResourceAttributes['host.name'] ILIKE '$host' AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE GROUP BY volume ORDER BY volume ASC

SELECT toStartOfInterval(Timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS time, ResourceAttributes['host.name'] AS host, count() AS events FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE host ILIKE '$host' AND Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 3 HOUR GROUP BY time, host ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT ResourceAttributes['host.name'] AS host, (1 - avg(Value)) * 100 AS "CPU %" FROM otel.otel_metrics WHERE MetricName = 'system.cpu.utilization' AND Attributes['state'] = 'idle' AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY host ORDER BY host

SELECT ResourceAttributes['host.name'] AS host, avg(Value) * 100 AS "Mem %" FROM otel.otel_metrics WHERE MetricName = 'system.memory.utilization' AND Attributes['state'] = 'used' AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY host ORDER BY host
